use_cases: Call-to-action buttons on landing pages requiring visual emphasis
Interactive buttons with animated shimmer effects for engagement
Premium-feeling gradient buttons for hero sections or pricing CTAs
Accessible animated buttons with keyboard navigation support
Multi-variant buttons supporting default, outline, and destructive styles
ai_summary: A premium animated gradient button component featuring continuous shimmer and pulse animations, 3D transform effects on hover and tap interactions, glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur, and multiple variant options including default, outline, ghost, and destructive styles. Built with Framer Motion for smooth spring-based animations and GPU-accelerated transforms for optimal performance across devices.
